query:
INSERT INTO activity
               (occurred_at, verb, actor_user_id, target_student_id, video_id)
           SELECT
               vwa.first_watched_at,
               'video_watched',
               vwa.user_id,
               vwa.user_id,
               vwa.video_id
           FROM video_watch_aggregates vwa
           WHERE vwa.first_watched_at IS NOT NULL
